description: Style NoteThis summer give your little one the unique gift of style and comfort with this vest from Madagascar. Featuring an attractive print on its front, this piece will easily capture his heart. Pair it with shorts for summer days or layer on a jacket for chilly evenings.Product DetailsBlue vest with printed front, round neck, sleeveless, white binding at neck, armhole and bottom hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmIron on reverse
